textByHash.0f99259979bf2816c738bd93b2db7a0ea3cd7f93: Fine. And there I was thinking you'd help.
textByHash.1d70738f784bdc47e39b188c06f02584fd0d3137: Oh, and make sure that the person is my sister, so you don't end up catching a random civilian.
textByHash.1dc3d8a666a7b2473775f37f20581791f40b0168: Through that door is a room with a cage and a control panel that operates a giant mechanical claw.
textByHash.1f39f9bb5b90dc880f5501fec10e1e915f85216d: You need to finish grabbing my twin before you come back through!
textByHash.36ca2abbefc46eeddda7567168b4066411c87c7a: Well done! You managed to catch my sister!
textByHash.46e449ed234b99a79d65d554c34220355f5c9c51: When you see someone on top of the glowing mark, then hit the button on the right hand panel, as this will send the claw down to pick them up.
textByHash.49e5e38df1a48b1eb9a967cb6901db4f0d62c2c0: Ok, when you turn the machine on you'll see the glowing mark on the floor where the claw is currently aiming, and you'll see a lever and button on the right hand side of your screen.
textByHash.4b394b5f6bf6eef3b1dd9f2fdf6ad2c2e82f009b: Well, come on over and I'll fill you in on what happened.
textByHash.50f764e35842e2b8f0a9a2bf47f80f9abf4f3583: Do be careful and make sure that there is someone on the mark, and not just walking past it.
textByHash.5705d99cff9d63ef55f00ddcf4454d5791e3df57: You need to use the control panel to use the claw!
textByHash.671e73023e2b980ddb27ec758a9ffa9cbf68a4b1: Fabulous! Now take a good long look at me because the door will be locked behind you. My twin looks exactly like me, even her clothes!
textByHash.6d5b095542b997e4d61f7de507e5020aa751cff9: Once she's in prison, she won't be causing me anymore bother!
textByHash.743d65a2b223bd71e46f5efc3fb20e60d212faf5: Through that door is a room with cage and a control panel that operates a giant mechanical claw.
textByHash.821046e837101e17412c82fbd0241847a6297e19: To move the claw's current location, click on the direction you want it to move in, as indicated on the right hand panel.
textByHash.9cd9b187fbf7cf0bb78c1a18b8939eb1d32f26ed: Wait! Do you know what you're doing here?
textByHash.9e7313a48d588b26a890572ce61403cf0641ebc6: Well, you tried your best I suppose. Come next door and talk to me.
textByHash.a994ee2e45a14107000f188c8381f1f0fd5949df: I lured my sister into the room so I can imprison her in the cage by using the claw. The problem is my sister managed to herd some innocent civilians in there with her.
textByHash.ab548468ccc72d305e652eebf3fc99dcce9e9e1b: Thank you for all your help. Take this as a reward.
textByHash.adb81d6e2ef831256288cdf3d3f5b8004bcf4ada: Once she's in prison she wont be causing me anymore bother!
textByHash.b97ed17f906df8f251d8c2572aab90c209274f3c: Such incompetence! I should never have asked a baboon like you to do a complex task like this!
textByHash.ba195b6158388c7dd8ad02e0fed7f1182fcd0b44: It's my evil twin sister! She's been galavanting around Gielinor committing crimes and now I'm getting the blame!
textByHash.bedf107fde9bdc3d360a6e990d1a1067d11a5eb5: Come next door and talk to me.
textByHash.d7f1e0d565f30cbacd32e30cc8eae5d78f47da7a: I lured my sister into the room so I could imprison her in the cage by using the claw. The problem is my sister managed to herd some innocent civilians in there with her.
textByHash.d92a5784e399e4243764b169aa785760c58b1b1f: You'll know which way the claw will go as the lever will point that way to show you.
textByHash.d9ef6e844f7bc6054a1654ac93b5d52b4e13d484: One more thing to make your life difficult; the magic powering the claw is running low so you'll only have two attempts to catch her.
textByHash.dfd1b9bbe3e63985c6f5a8841e7b25e124a38263: Fantastic! For so many years I've had to put up with her and now she's locked up for good.
textByHash.f6cea0b13566015d6b789e3cb9f62e54d87a7834: I need you to go next door and use the claw to catch my sister.
textByHash.fea48e00d3b744189c21cf8ce595027be312d296: By the way, would you like me to run through the controls for you, or do you think you'll manage?
